description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, layered appearance and a mix of dark gray and yellowish-brown hues. The stone features prominent stratification lines, suggesting sedimentary origins, and has a rough, uneven surface with jagged edges and natural fractures. One side displays a lighter, weathered face with visible markings and a measurement scale, indicating it may have been cataloged or studied. The stone's texture varies from coarse to slightly smoother patches, with some areas showing signs of minor erosion or chipping. Its overall form is blocky but asymmetrical, making it suitable as a natural obstacle or decorative element in urban landscapes. The stone's substantial mass and solid composition suggest it is not easily moved without significant effort.
description: A rugged, layered stone with dark gray and yellowish-brown tones, featuring rough, jagged surfaces and visible stratification. Its irregular, blocky shape and weathered texture make it a prominent natural obstacle.
description_view_0: This view shows the broad, flat face of the stone with pronounced layering and a dark gray coloration, highlighting its rough, stratified texture.
description_view_1: The side view reveals a more vertical, jagged profile with a mix of gray and yellowish-brown tones, and a deep crevice running through the stone.
description_view_2: The underside displays a lighter, weathered surface with black markings and a measurement scale, emphasizing its cataloged nature and sedimentary layers.
description_view_3: This view presents a tall, narrow face with deep grooves and a predominantly dark gray color, accentuating the stone's rugged, fractured structure.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a natural barrier
attribute_pattern: Distinct horizontal layering and stratification with irregular, natural veining and some mottling; no artificial carvings.
attribute_weathering: Rough with minor erosion and chipping, some surfaces appear weathered and lighter in color, indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smooth, man-made surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by soil or vegetation in situ.
